# Piping Flanges
> Professional piping flange systems

## About
Complete line of piping flanges for oil, gas, water, and chemical applications. ANSI and API rated components. We provide industry-leading piping system flanges with exceptional quality and expert support. Serving the I-10 East Refinery Corridor with products that meet or exceed ASME, ANSI, and API standards.

## Contact
- Phone: 281-484-8325
- Email: sales@texasflange.com
- Website: https://texasflange.com

## Services
- Piping System Flanges supply and distribution
- Custom flange manufacturing
- Technical consulting
- Rush order fulfillment

## Standards
- ASME B16.5, B16.47
- ANSI standards
- API 605, 6A
- AWWA C207
